programme.desc: Sue holds a séance during a sleepover with her fellow Wrestlerettes and swears that she's seen the ghost of Christopher Columbus and one of his ships. Axl finds himself being hazed by the football team and not allowed to enter his own Halloween party.

programme.title: The Middle: The Jump
programme.desc: Frankie is upset over constantly being made fun of by her family and finds some solace in the unconditional love she gets from a rescued dog. Frankie and Mike are stunned when Sue makes the high school volleyball team.

programme.title: The Middle: Thanksgiving V
programme.desc: Thanksgiving finds the Heck family in turmoil when Axl tries to figure out the perfect time to tell his parents that he dropped three out of his four college classes; Frankie's dad Tag admits to Mike that he lost a lot of money gambling online.

programme.title: The Middle: The Kiss
programme.desc: When Frankie's sister asks her to housesit, Frankie and Mike jump at the opportunity to have a romantic, kid-free weekend in an upscale home. Technology might just trump romance when they find themselves having a hard time with the gadgets in the house.

programme.title: Reba: Just Business
programme.desc: Houston's premier real estate agent, Steve Norris, contacts Reba and Van for a meeting. Reba is thrilled but Van is concerned that he will once again be relegated to acting as Reba's assistant at the new company. Barbra Jean is looking better than ever.

programme.title: Reba: Trading Spaces
programme.desc: Van builds a new home office in the garage so he and Reba can be more productive. Reba finds juggling family and the additional workload is difficult. Van has a surprising reason he feels pressure to earn more money.

programme.title: Reba: Roll With It
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when Kyra moves back in with her, but is stunned when she catches her drinking. Brock confesses he let her have the occasional beer in the house and reluctantly agrees to go along with this new parenting plan.

programme.title: Reba: The Break Up
programme.desc: Reba and Van call it quits on their real estate partnership; Barbra Jean auditions for TV.

programme.title: Reba: Sweet Child O'Mine
programme.desc: Barbra Jean panics a pregnant Cheyenne by remarking that her baby may turn out to be a mini-Kyra. Reba decides its time she told Cheyenne that she was the mean sister, not Kyra.

programme.title: Reba: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: Kyra has been secretly taping Van and posting the video on YouTube.com for the entire world to see and mock. Reba advises Brock to make a grand romantic gesture to save his marriage to Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Movie: Baby, It's Cold Inside
programme.desc: A travel agent is up for a promotion and has to forgo her tropical vacation for something much colder.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Remembering RBG: A Nation Ugly Cries
programme.desc: Desi Lydic celebrates the legacy of iconic Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg while grappling with her passing in a show featuring interviews about the countless lives she touched.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Cock Magic
programme.desc: There are illegal goings-on in the basement of City Wok.

programme.title: South Park: Insecurity
programme.desc: Cartman signs up for a home security system.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: The entire town is gearing up for the annual Fourth of July celebration when a state-wide ban on fireworks is imposed. Jimbo and Ned cross the border into Mexico to get some Grade-A illegal fireworks.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: The children of South Park are invited to Arkansas for the 'Four Million Child Blow 2000,' the first worldwide recorder concert. When Cartman discovers the 'brown noise,' he changes the music for the concert, causing a very smelly mess.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Humans from the year 3045 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work. When they start taking the jobs of true, hard working Americans, the town takes drastic action to save the country.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: Futurama: The Day the Earth Stood Stupid

programme.title: Futurama: That's Lobstertainment

programme.title: Futurama: The Birdbot of Ice-Catraz

programme.title: Futurama: The Luck of the Fryrish

programme.title: Futurama: The Cyber House Rules
programme.desc: Leela reunites with a plastic surgeon that can give her two eyes; Bender wants to adopt.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Da Doggone Daddy-Daughter Dinner Dance
programme.desc: Cleveland tries to make inroads with his new stepdaughter, Roberta, by asking her to accompany him to the school's father-daughter dance. The evening seems to be going smoothly until Cleveland has a mishap with the family pet.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The One About Friends
programme.desc: Cleveland is concerned that Cleveland Jr. has no friends, so he invites his neighbour's son Ernie to their house. A neglected Ernie becomes too attached to the family, leaving Cleveland to call child services to have Ernie taken back home.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Birth of a Salesman
programme.desc: When Cleveland needs a new job, Tim hooks him up at Waterman Cable. But when Cleveland becomes the top salesman, Tim is green with envy and wishes for bad things to happen to Cleveland.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Cleveland Jr. Cherry Bomb

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Ladies' Night

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Brown Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: From Bed to Worse
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna are excited to have the house to themselves when Cleveland Jr. and Roberta go on a school trip to Washington, D.C., but a disgruntled Rallo will do whatever it takes to keep Cleveland and Donna apart.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Cleveland Brown Christmas
programme.desc: When Cleveland fills in as Santa Claus at his office holiday party, he has one too many eggnogs and lets the truth slip about Rallo's father. With Rallo's admiration for his dad destroyed, Cleveland tries to reconnect father and son.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Field of Streams
programme.desc: After a nostalgic flashback to the glory days as his high school's baseball all-star, Cleveland visits his alma mater to find out there's no longer a team. Principal Wally gives Cleveland one week to raise money to rebuild the stadium.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt

programme.title: The Office: The Convention

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Somebody's Watching Me
programme.desc: A viral video of Jane's bad day potentially jeopardizes her career and reputation. Meanwhile, the squad rushes to solve a puzzling murder case involving a conspiracy theorist.

programme.desc: A popular high school teacher is killed in a hit and run that is clearly no accident. The squad works to solve the case, but Jane is preoccupied with Lt. Martinez's apparent favouritism towards his own drug unit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Built for Speed
programme.desc: A late night drag race turns deadly and the squad works quickly to solve the case. Jane suspects that the motive for murder may have been an attempt to conceal drug trafficking, but Lt. Martinez seems to be thwarting her investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Judge, Jury and Executioner
programme.desc: A mock trial adviser dies tragically during a competition. Meanwhile, Angela's increased interest in selling brownies has Jane concerned that she may be hiding financial issues, and Tommy hires a lawyer to settle his claim.

programme.desc: The squad rushes to solve a violent homicide case muddied by conflicting evidence. Maura is burdened with the major decision of whether to take in her recently paroled grandfather.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Home Maintenance and Design Inspiration
programme.desc: Water filtration solutions; children's bedroom design inspiration; protection tips from heat damage and UV rays.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Feel the Earth Move
programme.desc: An earthquake shakes the ground at Grey Sloan Memorial Hospital, trapping Maggie in an elevator and threatening Meredith's long streak of successful surgeries. Meanwhile, Owen gives medical advice to a child over the phone and Ben confides in Jackson.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Don't Dream It's Over
programme.desc: A patient's condition sparks a conversation between Richard and Maggie about Alzheimer's disease; April and Jackson struggle to return to their normal lives and Arizona is faced with the reality that Callie is moving on.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Resulting from the showdown in the murder room, Brenda finds herself taking some involuntary time off. When she is asked to help a friend solve a murder that is linked to a terrorist group, Brenda works to find the killer and still keep it under wraps.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Four of a Kind
programme.desc: Four wealthy one percenters are left for dead outside a hospital emergency room in a twisty- curvy murder that leads through an impossible list of suspects.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Blackout
programme.desc: Jack Raydor is back again, defending a man who is attempting to withdraw a confession in the murder of his wife. A last-second video purporting to provide the defendant with an alibi alerts the Major Crimes team to the possibility of a conspiracy.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reality Check
programme.desc: Sharon and the team investigate a murder during the taping of a reality competition show pitting married couples against each other. The case has a profound effect on Sanchez, bringing back memories of his late wife.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Taking the Fall
programme.desc: The Major Crimes team is called to investigate a follow up attack on a victim of road rage, as a business executive and his wife fall prey to a furious driver in a pickup truck.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Jumping Off Point
programme.desc: Sharon and the team investigate the murder of a young man pushed off the top of a parking structure who was somehow able to afford a high-end apartment without any visible means of support.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College
programme.desc: College lacrosse player Yeardley Love is found dead in her college apartment. But the community is left stunned when cops arrest a member of a wealthy, prominent family.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Backcountry Backstabber
programme.desc: After a woman is viciously slain in her country home, police are stumped as to who could have had a vendetta against the kind and generous woman.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Til Death Do Us Party
programme.desc: When, Thomas Talley, a family man is gunned down in his driveway, his bereft widow Kendra recounts how a wild night in New Orleans ended in murder. Only after police begin to dissect her story, do they realize that there might be more to her tale.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.desc: Jodi Arias is a pretty, small town waitress and aspiring photographer. Travis Alexander is a handsome, devout Mormon, and successful businessman. Months after their sexually charged romance began, Travis was found brutally murdered in his shower at home.

programme.desc: Big Chief and Axman race for number one, setting up an explosive night as the season begins winding down.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Messing With Texas
programme.desc: Everyone is on edge for the last race of the season, and huge issues because of tropical storm Nestor might create a terrible season end for the Dirty 7.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Jungle Treasure
programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: Titanic: The Last Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into the sinking of the Titanic reveals new discoveries that might finally explain the mysteries of her last moments, and experts get closer to a shocking secret: if there was a way to save almost everyone on board.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tofu Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads out to California to spend a day at an electronic waste recycling plant, and then he jets off to Honolulu to learn how to make tofu.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Control Specialist
programme.desc: Mike heads to California to work as an Animal Control Specialist by removing skunks and other rodents from under people's houses.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bone Black
programme.desc: Mike heads to Michigan where he gets dirty in the Bone Black plant. He then meets with twin sisters who are huge fans of the show.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Exotic Nanny
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to help out at a ranch that harbours and breeds different exotic animal species including lemurs, sloths, bearcats and camels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hair Fairy
programme.desc: Mike climbs Jelm Mountain to help change out an old wooden power pole with a metal one.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cedar Log Peeler
programme.desc: Mike lends a hand with debarking, peeling, and processing wood for a cedar log cabin.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Termite Researcher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.desc: The competition begins as 12 experienced BBQ pitmasters scramble to create one bite that captures their culinary identity. Bobby Flay, Eddie Jackson and Michael Symon keep an eye on the action as they plan their team picks.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Team Feast
programme.desc: Bobby Flay, Eddie Jackson and Michael Symon pick their BBQ teams, and the competitors are challenged to create a barbecue feast for judges Carson Kressley, Rodney Scott and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson get to know their teams better through nostalgic challenges that inspire them to dig deep into their BBQ memory banks and challenge their ability to work together.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: It's Not the Destination, It's the Journey
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac challenges three of America's best backyard grillers to create three regionally inspired dishes in hopes of winning a brand-new outdoor kitchen. The competitors take on Southern chicken and coastal cuisine.

programme.title: Chopped: Bangin' Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: The chefs imagine they're making a memorable meal for a backyard party in this cookout competition. A wacky hybrid protein and a ketchup stand-in are two of the ingredients the competitors must work into appetizers.

programme.title: Chopped: Meat Your Match
programme.desc: Four female butchers battle it out for a shot at $10,000. In the first round, the competitors must break down a large piece of beef while sizing up a sweet salad in the basket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Backyard Grill
programme.desc: Kardea fires up the grill for an old-fashioned backyard barbecue and invites her family over to enjoy some of her charbroiled dishes. She makes pimento cheese-stuffed burgers and grilled sea island wings, plus southern pickles and okra on the side.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Picnic in the Park
programme.desc: Kardea picnics in the park with friends and her favourite one-hand wonders like rotisserie chicken salad sandwiches with homemade bacon jam and chilled black-eyed pea salad. The lunch finishes with delicious blackberry hand pies.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Beach Blanket Country Boil
programme.desc: Kardea hits the beach with friends for some fun in the sun and a summer-perfect picnic featuring a low country boil, fresh peach arugula salad and sparkling summer lemonade. For dessert there's frozen confetti vanilla whoopie pies.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites friends over for an afternoon Lowcountry cookout. On the menu are Grilled Mahi Sandwiches, Grilled Shrimp Macaroni Salad and Grilled Potatoes tossed with EVOO and Chives. For something sweet, Kardea whips up a Berry Dump Cake.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Titanic Treats
programme.desc: From monster sushi rolls and a five-layer pizza cake to Texas-sized cinnamon rolls and a towering pancake sundae, these dining hot spots are bursting at the seams with titanic treats.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Finger Lickin'
programme.desc: From burgers bursting with chili and cheese to a whole backyard barbecue in one messy mega dish, these entrees are overloaded in stickiness, sauciness and all sorts of awesomeness that's finger-licking good.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Twists
programme.desc: From a lobster and filet mignon taco donut to a classic Japanese noodle dish done as juicy burger, these chefs are serving up some of the country's most mouth-watering mashups.

programme.title: Chopped: There Will Be Bloody Marys
programme.desc: The chefs find a fancy cake and bloody Mary in the first basket. Then in entree round, the three chefs must create dished from ground chicken and seafood paella.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 1
programme.desc: For this tournament event, 16 champions are back to defeat Chef Bobby Flay. In the premiere battle, a strangely sweet sandwich and beautiful seafood await the champs. Round two involves an unusual beef jerky product and a twist on hummus.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 2
programme.desc: In this battle, the first basket includes champion-caliber ingredients like an anything-but-basic burger. The three chefs in round two have ambitious plans for their dishes, and a green veggie is part of the puzzle in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 3
programme.desc: In the first round, an oven mishap leads to an alarming situation. An American classic in frozen form threatens to stump the chefs in the entree round, and the dessert round leaves the champs to make big plans for a candy-themed tart.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Spirit of the Hunter

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees

programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Forever Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple has saved $50,000 to renovate their dated home, and while they agree now is the time to do it, what exactly to renovate is up for debate! Tiffany presents them with three different ways to spend their dollars and secure their forever farmhouse.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Demo Disaster
programme.desc: A couple's historic home is full of character, but between the boxy living areas and four people sharing one bathroom, the layout falls short for a modern family. Tiffany's stunning renovation designs have the power to change their lives for the better.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Tiffany Brooks faces double the design challenge when transforming not one, but two homes! She tackles a property bursting with potential and orange oak before turning her attention to a couple who only use their living room to access the front door.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Newlyweds With a Clash of Style
programme.desc: Newlyweds tackle a big kitchen and living room makeover that leaves them stressed out and on opposite sides of the design spectrum. Christina plays mediator to help them get on the same page while delivering a stunning new design.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Bold Kitchen for a Brit
programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Dysfunctional to Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: Christina returns to work after having her baby, but she may need help from her friends as she juggles a newborn and tackles her new clients' home. The couple wants a bright kitchen with a modern-farmhouse design and a layout that opens up their space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A Marriage of Styles
programme.desc: When a friendly playdate turns into a request for help, Christina takes on a coastal couple's primary bathroom redesign. She's got to find a way to satisfy a design-centric mom while meeting her Hollywood stuntman husband in the middle.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Heartfelt Hacienda Makeover
programme.desc: When Christina's design partner James brings her a project from a musical family in Fullerton, California, she learns that their house is full of memories and tailors her design to underscore a homeowner's nostalgia.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: New Design in the Old Hood
programme.desc: When Christina's old neighbors contact her for design help, she's tasked with remodeling a large, water-damaged home. Working with a floor plan similar to her old house, Christina gets to remake parts of their home in ways she never got to do in her own.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Outdated to Upgraded
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie execute their vision to entice high-end buyers to an outdated rambler. They unveil the home's hidden potential by opening up the floorplan and decorating with a transitional style throughout, leading to an unbelievable offer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno
programme.desc: A daughter begs Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. Using a few of their tricks, the twins change its dated and choppy layout by opening up the home and giving it a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Small House Save

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Historic Home Rescue

programme.desc: Don Wildman searches for the identity of one of America's most notorious killers. He meets with a retired inspector who worked on the case, learns code breaking from an expert cryptographer and reveals a new theory on who may be responsible.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Alien Encounters in Area 51
programme.desc: Don investigates to find out why the American government is keeping this top-secret facility confidential and if its purpose is to protect us from our adversaries here on Earth, and the universe.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: A Frightening Ghost Attack and More
programme.desc: A shadowy entity attacks a ghost hunter, a mechanic is visited by an angel and a family hears the bloodcurdling howls of a Bigfoot.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: An Ogopogo Sighting and More
programme.desc: Mysterious gunfire at an old Civil War battlefield suggests the battle is still happening, waged by ghosts. A family records falling, fiery orbs in the sky with their doorbell security camera. A team is accosted by the spirits of a murdered family.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Utah Bigfoot Hunt and More
programme.desc: Friends in Utah track down a Bigfoot spotted in the mountains, a total skeptic is attacked by a spirit at a haunted fort in England and ghostly passengers appear in a Hong Kong airport.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: The Montauk Monster and More
programme.desc: An internet-famous monster washes up again on a New York beach, parents catch ghosts haunting nurseries on baby monitors and a UFO saves a Russian town.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Encounter at an Abandoned Asylum and More
programme.desc: A paranormal investigator is attacked by an entity in an abandoned asylum in Connecticut, a driver witnesses a strange UFO over a hotel in North Carolina and an Oregon marijuana dispensary is haunted by ghosts of the past.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hide the Salami
programme.desc: Pushed to the brink, Francesca loses all trust in Elizabeth while Captain Lee shares an unfortunate bond with the charter guests. Rachel continues to grow frustrated with the interior over miscommunication.

programme.title: Below Deck: Don't Cry for Me Antigua
programme.desc: Ashling suffers the consequences of her white lie while Izzy’s promotion creates waves on deck and Rob makes his feelings abundantly clear. A condiment mishap fuels the contention between Francesca and Rachel.

programme.title: Below Deck: Premature Evacuation
programme.desc: Forced to reckon with their friction, Francesca finally comes to a decision regarding Elizabeth’s future on deck. Meanwhile, Rachel’s feelings toward the interior take a toll on the crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Never Before Scene: Last Call for Parsifal!
programme.desc: Follow the crew of a luxury sailing yacht cruising the blue waters of Corfu, Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Reunion Part One
programme.desc: Follow the crew of a luxury sailing yacht cruising the blue waters of Corfu, Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments 2021
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew share the best and worst moments from four seasons sailing the Mediterranean. Featuring the most Yachtrageous memories of the unforgettable crews and over the top guests that have come aboard.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: I Like Big Boats and I Cannot Lie
programme.desc: Captain Sandy Yawn is at the helm of the mega-yacht Wellington, cruising one of the most desired yachting locations in the Mediterranean: Mallorca, Spain. Malia returns as Captain Sandy's first female Bosun, a role she hopes to grow into.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Can't Touch This!
programme.desc: Hannah struggles to get her Second Stew in line, and tensions reach a boiling point when Lara refuses to take direction from Hannah. In the galley, Kiko finds himself up against guest that are less than satisfied. Malia deals with a green deck crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Italian's Job
programme.desc: Romance is in bloom on the crew's first night out of the season as Pete makes his move while Rob and Jess find themselves connecting on a deeper level. The second charter kicks off when guest with ties to the music industry arrive.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments 2021
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew share the best and worst moments from four seasons sailing the Mediterranean. Featuring the most Yachtrageous memories of the unforgettable crews and over the top guests that have come aboard.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.desc: Join Chef Ben Robinson and eight new crew members as they prepare the luxury yacht, the Ionian Princess, for a new charter season around the glittering Greek Islands. Fresh faces present new challenges as the crew learns to work and live together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Game Time
programme.desc: The crew's efforts to stream a football game in the middle of the Mediterranean don’t go as planned, but their efforts don't go unnoticed by charter guests. Ben redeems himself after the previous night's Moussaka mishaps.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Model Deckhands
programme.desc: After the crew's first night off, Hannah puts her foot down when Bobby and Danny bring girls back to the yacht. Bryan attempts to smooth things over with the captain, but the boys are given their first strike.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Lovesick Danny
programme.desc: Danny disobeys a direct order from Captain Mark when he decides to give a love poem to a charter guest. Julia calls her boyfriend in England, while Bobby's feelings for her grow stronger. Ben and Hannah's work relationship has reached smooth sailing.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: My Big Fat Greek Threesome
programme.desc: After Ben apologizes for shutting down Bryan and Tiffany’s fun, the crew prepares for their next charter hailing from Oklahoma. After hours, the charter guests seem to have a threesome in the jacuzzi and once again, Danny oversteps his boundaries.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Entrée-Vous
programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's Got Game?
programme.desc: Hannah experiences the ultimate betrayal when Ben goes to the Captain about their galley miscommunication. After back-to-back charters, the Ionian Princess Crew finally enjoy a day off until Bryan decides to give Danny a lesson in dickie etiquette.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter King
programme.desc: Hannah’s migraine explodes when the bachelor charter guests bring back a large group of girls on board. Upon their exit, the bachelors anoint Danny as the charter MVP, much to the chagrin of Bobby and Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: Hannah and Ben redefine their relationship while Bobby realizes he can't shut off his feelings for Julia after a flirty night with Hannah. After the crew pulls off a beach BBQ without a hitch, Ben is tasked with making American S'mores in Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter From Heaven, Charter From Hell?
programme.desc: While Danny is away at the hospital, the crew revels in his absence. When Bryan confronts Jen on her ability to tie knots, she finally stands up to him. Meanwhile, Tiffany's feelings for Ben increase, while Bobby continues to be sidelined by Julia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: They Hate Us Cuz They Ain't Us

programme.desc: In 2002, Gary McKinnon claimed that he had evidence that a secret military space program existed. It's possible that the U.S. has a greater presence in space than publicly known.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: FBI vs MLK
programme.desc: In 1962, Martin Luther King Jr. criticized J. Edgar Hoover and the FBI for refusing to prosecute white supremacists. Hoover took the comments personally, and ordered his bureau to investigate King.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Freemason Factor
programme.desc: Learn about the Freemasons, a secret society that that were highly influential in the founding of the United States.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Hunt for Hitler's Relics
programme.desc: Adolph Hitler was deeply into the occult, so much so that he established a Nazi organization called the Ahnenerbe to track down and confiscate holy relics.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Torso Murders
programme.desc: The Great Depression of the 1930s saw many of the poor move into shantytowns. One such shanty was terrorized by The Mad Butcher of Kingsbury Run, who was never identified or apprehended.

programme.title: Haunted History: A Deadly Possession
programme.desc: A man experienced paranormal activity after purchasing an unassuming wine box and sold it online where it was bought by a museum director in the Midwest who experienced the same things.

programme.title: Haunted History: Murder Castle
programme.desc: Just down the road from the 1893 Chicago's World Fair, H. H. Holmes was building a hotel designed for murder, which would later be known as 'The Murder Castle'. Today, the spirits of his victims attempt to tell the truth behind the story.

programme.title: Haunted History: Lost Souls of Pennhurst
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, Pennhurst Asylum became overcrowded, which resulted in an overwhelmed staff and rampant abuse. It was finally shut down, but it is said the ghosts of patients and employees still roam the halls today.

programme.title: Haunted History: Katrina Cannibal
programme.desc: New Orleans, Louisiana has a storied spiritual history, and is considered by many to be the most haunted city in America. After the tragic Hurricane Katrina, one man committed a shocking act some thought to be the result of possession.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: In 1969, Hollywood was at the centre of a brutal and sadistic killing spree. Charles Manson and his cult of followers killed more than half a dozen innocent people, two of which are believed to haunt a house on Cielo Drive.

programme.title: Movie: The Night of the Iguana

programme.title: Movie: Midnight Lace
programme.desc: A young woman can't get anyone to believe she's being stalked.

programme.desc: A young American singer gets akumatized into Frightningale. Armed with a magic mike, she wants to turn Paris into a giant musical. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep the rhythm if they want to stop he.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Flying Crown

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Silent Knight

programme.title: NCIS: Jeopardy
programme.desc: Ziva is in shock when a routine tactic she uses to subdue a suspect might be the cause of his sudden death. As Ducky and Abby work to clear Ziva's name, Gibb learns that Director Shepard has been kidnapped by their dead suspect's brother.

programme.title: NCIS: Hiatus
programme.desc: As the team attempts to put their feelings about Gibb's injury aside and work on the investigation, Tony steps into the role of senior agent, causing a bit of resentment from other team members.

programme.title: NCIS: Hiatus
programme.desc: As the team tries to track down the terrorists behind the bombing that injured Gibbs, they learn that the group is planning another bombing of 9/11 magnitude and that Gibbs has information about their plan. Meanwhile, Gibbs is visited by his old boss.

programme.title: NCIS: Shalom
programme.desc: As each team member deals with the absence of Gibbs in their own way, Ziva's past comes back to haunt her when she witnesses an assassination of a military attaché by her former Mossad partner. Ziva then seeks refuge at the Israeli Embassy.

programme.title: NCIS: Escaped
programme.desc: When a convict from Agent Fornell's past escapes and threatens not only him but also his young daughter, Gibbs comes out of retirement to re-open the convict's armed robbery case. But, it seems the man has something other than vengeance on his mind.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Abel and Willing
programme.desc: A man is forced to make a tough decision, kill himself or kill his wife. The detectives learn that a deranged psychologist, Abel, is using this as a social experiment and to help vindicate his grandfather who was once forced with the same choice.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Gods and Insects
programme.desc: A headless body is discovered at the bottom of a storm drain and it appears to be a mob hit but soon the detectives are introduced to the high class world of escorts and to the gods of finance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Love on Ice
programme.desc: Four childhood friends have been keeping a secret since they were kids about the murder of a friend. When one of the four turns up dead Nicholas and Stevens must uncover the truth.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Snapped: Janice Bonnell
programme.desc: Sleepy Seadrift Texas is unnerved by the death of a local landscaper after evidence at the scene of an apparent hit-and-run points to a deceptive killer with a dangerous past.

programme.title: Snapped: Annette Cahill
programme.desc: The deadly beating of a young man in West Liberty, Iowa sits unsolved for twenty-five years, until cold case detectives are approached by an unexpected witness. Their renewed search leads them to the unlikeliest of killers.

programme.title: Snapped: Kayla Nelson
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a devoted father leads Arkansas police to a shocking crime scene, the search for answers reveals gang threats, and a killer that's willing to go to great lengths to escape justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Olicia Lee
programme.desc: A former ladies man has a change of heart when he falls for a pious daycare worker, but when his body is found floating in a creek, detectives discover there's more to their relationship than meets the eye.

programme.title: Snapped: Maria Hernandez
programme.desc: The American Dream for a hard-working immigrant is suddenly cut short, when he is violently murdered with a hatchet in the streets of a Las Vegas suburb. Investigators sift through lies and follow a bloody trail to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Thomas Gilbert, Jr.
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a New York business man zeroes in on a family member unwilling to give up their plush lifestyle launching a tabloid frenzy. A closer look reveals the suspect's inner demons calling the greedy motive into question.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Earth Stood Cool

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Cur With Love
programme.desc: When a fire at the retirement home forces Grampa to move home with the Simpsons, Homer throws out his back on moving day and decides to stay home to recover.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Test Before Trying

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Changing of the Guardian

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Kelly: King of the Rats
programme.desc: When keeping the basement rodent-free drives Charlie to the brink, the gang decides to put the cynicism aside and throw a surprise party to cheer him up.

programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Stories: Riddles of Island Ruins
programme.desc: A bizarre concrete hideout off the coast of Croatia and a desert island with a contagious past are now forgotten ruins; experts investigate the secrets behind these mysterious island structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Grave of the Red Skulls
programme.desc: When experts discover a 500-year-old grave, they find mysterious red skulls, pointing to a shocking mass sacrifice; experts use the latest technology and state-of-the-art forensics to investigate what happened at this horrific site.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Tomb of the Red Queen
programme.desc: In an abandoned Maya city, an archaeologist discovers the tomb of a mysterious red skeleton decorated in jade and pearl treasures; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal who this person was and why they were buried so.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Heist in the Holy Land
programme.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome. Now, a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Doomsday Curse
programme.desc: Ancient scriptures describe the Ark of the Covenant as possessing an almighty force with the capacity to kill; now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path in a quest to discover the truth behind its mythical power.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: In a sleepy spot near Silicon Valley, high school boys are being harassed online by a new girl in town. Before long, secrets unfold that tear the community apart. But one mother has heard it all before and won't stop until justice is finally served.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: A young woman is swept off her feet by the man of her dreams but before they have a chance to meet, a tragic accident sends him to jail. Against the odds, they grow even closer. But when she disappears, her family begins to question his story.

programme.title: Someone's at the Door
programme.desc: A mysterious house guest becomes the number one suspect in an arson and murder investigation.

programme.title: Disappeared: Breaking Away
programme.desc: 19-year-old college sophomore Martin Roberts is a popular fraternity brother. Suddenly he goes missing. The only clue he leaves: a cryptic note. Baffling secrets emerge. But 2 years later, his family remains desperate to know what has happened to him.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: A young woman is swept off her feet by the man of her dreams but before they have a chance to meet, a tragic accident sends him to jail. Against the odds, they grow even closer. But when she disappears, her family begins to question his story.

programme.title: Someone's at the Door
programme.desc: A mysterious house guest becomes the number one suspect in an arson and murder investigation.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Words
programme.desc: Logan Schiendelman vanishes, and authorities find his car abandoned. Multiple tips claim seeing Logan, but searches turn up nothing. With no evidence of foul play, questions surface and police are forced to examine his family's controversial past.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Brilliant schoolboy Breck Bednar has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he's introduced to a successful entrepreneur online, passion turns to obsession and the game becomes deadly.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Golden Buddha
programme.desc: On the night of August 9, 1991, two men break into the Buddhist temple on the outskirts of Phoenix, AZ and murder all 9 people inside. It seems like an open and shut case, until the gun used is linked to a pair of local teenagers.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Games People Play
programme.desc: Robert Marshall loves his money and his mistress, but when his wife hires a PI to catch him in the act, who will pay? The passion between Lisa and Ron Hunter is electric, until a younger man jeopardizes their happiness. Will jealousy turn to murder?

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: Single mom, Anna Torres found the love of her life when she met Ed Montano. The couple wed, and Ed was a father figure Anna's daughter Lizzie. A decade later, Anna found that Ed's kind ways were a mask—under which he was hiding horrible secrets.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Four's a Crowd
programme.desc: Charmaine Whalen wanted a big beautiful wedding with the love of her life. When she met a handsome stranger who promised her just that, she thought her dreams were coming true, but Charmaine would soon find herself in the centre of her worst nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Luther is a minister's son who falls hard for a pastor's daughter, Anita. With love and faith, they make it work until the work runs out. And the crushing blow of failure turns heaven-on-earth into a bloody hell.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deceitful Secrets
programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Girl with the Gold Earring
programme.desc: A young mom falls for a married military man after a chance meeting at his naval base.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bonfire of Blood
programme.desc: An argument about access to a disputed road puts two Lompico, California men at each other's throats. Things progress from intimidation and property damage to a backhoe attack and, finally, one of the most shocking murders the area has ever seen.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: Tipping Point
programme.desc: In the spring of 1861, America's grand experiment in democracy is on the verge of collapse. The country is going to war and majestic landscapes become hell on earth.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: The Butcher's Bill
programme.desc: As summer of 1862 approaches, the American Civil War is in its second year. It has become a more brutal and bloody conflict than anyone ever believed possible. North and South march on, knowing the next battlefield is just beyond the horizon.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: A New Birth of Freedom
programme.desc: By January of 1863, the American Civil War has entered its third year. More than 200,000 soldiers have been killed or wounded and still there is no end in sight. With both committed to victory, the Civil War is about to enter its bloodiest days.

programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bold In, Old Out
programme.desc: Tamara uses her design expertise to modernize an outdated, 1970s Tudor home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.
