programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wake Up Little Sushi
programme.desc: Alton investigates the ins and outs of ordering, eating, shopping for, and even making sushi.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Little Big Lunch: Eggs Benedict
programme.desc: Eggs Benedict is king of the brunch, so Alton rebuilds a 'Good Eats' version.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Original Inventions
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks back on favorite dishes that are also original inventions. Whether they were created out of necessity, the result of a happy accident or icons dreamed up for royalty, the origins of these edible icons are one-of-a-kind.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Guayaquil
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the tropical and frenetic coastal cuisine of Guayaquil, Ecuador. Bright flavours and local ingredients define their gastronomy, and Andrew tries everything from red mangrove crab to a plantain dumpling studded with crispy pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Original Inventions
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks back on favorite dishes that are also original inventions. Whether they were created out of necessity, the result of a happy accident or icons dreamed up for royalty, the origins of these edible icons are one-of-a-kind.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Guayaquil
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the tropical and frenetic coastal cuisine of Guayaquil, Ecuador. Bright flavours and local ingredients define their gastronomy, and Andrew tries everything from red mangrove crab to a plantain dumpling studded with crispy pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gone Camping
programme.desc: Gear up and stake your tents as host Michael McKean sets up camp just in time for supper.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Brunch Beauties
programme.desc: Michael McKean skips breakfast and forgets about lunch so he can get to the bottom of brunch. He discovers how eggs Benedict was blessed by a pope and that we may have a melty mishap to thank for the croque monsieur.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Waffle Truth
programme.desc: Alton teaches us how to build a better batter for waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game IV (Scallops)
programme.desc: Tales of a monster scallop send Alton traveling to a small town in Maine to investigate. After meeting with the nervous locals, he sets sail with Capt. Squint upon his house boat, the Okra where he's forced to cook a whole lot of scallop dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: If It Ain't Broccoli Don't Fix It
programme.desc: Alton Brown transforms broccoli from limp and bitter to crisp and delicious.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation IV: Crawfish
programme.desc: Alton Brown discovers the sustainable alternative to lobster, the crawfish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Feeling Punchy

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cheesy Dishes
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says 'Cheese' as he explores 15 of the best cheesy dishes across the U.S. The creamiest, smoothest and stringiest French, Italian, Mexican and American cheesy classics and innovations are on display.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.desc: A professional baseball pitcher's daughter goes missing, and the Major Crimes team's investigation leads them to the very limits of the justice system. Rusty is put in an extremely awkward position as Slider approaches the last phase of his trial.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: Sharon and Major Crimes rush to capitalize on a shocking discovery made in a church. Stephanie and Sanchez's connection grows as they bond over lost loved ones. Rusty learns from Provenza that his biological mother's ex, Gary, is a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Death Row Confessions

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Lucifer the Cat

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Spitting Cobras of the World

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Heating Up a Sun Bear Romance

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Reunion Part One

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Reunion Part Two

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Emotionally In-Vested

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: White Nannies Can't Jump
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's podcasting career almost ends before it starts when Todd goes overboard with preparation. Meanwhile, Nanny Faye joins a senior basketball league.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Restaurant Impossible
programme.desc: Chase decides to start his own candle business and Julie finds that her dream of opening up her own restaurant clashes with Todd's vision.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Spoiled Sports
programme.desc: Todd gets roped into a boys trip to Universal Orlando for Grayson's birthday, and Julie teaches Chloe a lesson in sportsmanship before her first horse riding competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Perfect Equation
programme.desc: When Savannah brings home her new boyfriend Todd takes the opportunity to test his intentions. Chase and Savannah step up and help when Grayson struggles with a math test.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord of the Earrings
programme.desc: Todd tries to teach Julie a lesson about keeping track of her jewelry after she loses another expensive piece. Nanny Faye enlists Chase's help for a neighborhood porch competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Diplomatic Immunity
programme.desc: Due to a work commitment, Julie must miss Chloe's Pre-K graduation while Todd takes over her duties. Savannah tries to prove to Todd she's ready for a new job in California.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Towing the Line
programme.desc: Chase takes advantage of his dad's car when Savannah signs them up to babysit over Father's Day. Meanwhile, Grayson has trouble getting along with Savannah's boyfriend, Nic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pool's Out for Summer
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to get Chase to move to Nashville, Todd offers him their house that he's already promised to Savannah. Meanwhile the ladies can't get enough of Alison's new hot pool instructor.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Big 50
programme.desc: Todd ponders the first half of his life as his 50th birthday approaches. Meanwhile, Grayson clamors to be left home alone now that he's 12 years old.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Three's Company
programme.desc: Hannah continues to struggle with working under the close eye of Captain Sandy. After a mishap with the anchor, Sandy realizes her new deck crew has a lot to learn if they are going to have a successful charter season. Bobby develops a crush on Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Chefs, Lies and FaceTime
programme.desc: The rift between Bobby and Hannah grows even wider when Lauren is dragged into a heated debate about the past. A frustrated Bobby calls out Lauren for having an affair with one of his close friends, leaving an emotional Lauren to feel ostracized.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Chained Up and No Place to Go
programme.desc: The naked guests distract the crew as they try to stay focused on their jobs. As Hannah and Bobby hash out their differences, Lauren struggles as the tension mounts between her and Bobby. Meanwhile, Bugsby deals with the loss of her grandmother.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Capt. Sandy gets frustrated when the deck crew makes a dangerous mistake. Also, tension mounts between Adam and Hannah, Bobby springs into action when a guest suffers an accident and a wild night out sparks romance, resulting in a love triangle.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions
programme.desc: Malia, Wes and Adam find themselves in uncharted emotional territory as news of their love triangle spreads below deck. The Oklahomans return as charter guests keeping the interior on their toes as they struggle to keep up with their demanding requests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Malia and Adam share a romantic moment, but complications arise when she continues to flirt with Wes. The charter guests play dirty as they challenge the Sirocco crew to a relay race. Hannah and Adam butt heads again.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: iCloudy With a Chance of Secrets
programme.desc: Wes declares his feelings for Malia, while her relationship with Adam takes a shocking turn. Max's girlfriend visits. And when Bugsy makes a startling discovery that Hannah has broken yachtie code, Hannah faces Captain Sandy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Kissing Up
programme.desc: When Hannah and Adam continue to clash about the quality of his service, a frustrated Captain Sandy insists that Adam step up his game. Despite trying to keep their relationship professional, Wes and Malia share an intimate moment while on the job.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Dubrovnik Wedgie
programme.desc: When bad weather keeps Sirocco at port, the crew scrambles to keep a VIP charter broker and her friends happy. Wes announces his choice for lead deckhand, causing tension to erupt.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Swing Shift
programme.desc: Adam's wedgie prank goes awry, and Wes does everything he can to avoid Adam. A one day charter quickly feels like an eternity when a group of eccentric Texans board Sirocco and keep the demands flowing more than the drinks. Malia gets on Sandy's bad side.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Buggin' Out
programme.desc: Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Maxed Out
programme.desc: Kevin and Horny Mike make an unauthorized purchase, forcing Danny to teach them a valuable lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Haunted Hog
programme.desc: Danny has no interest in a rubber-to-roof restoration on a '73 Chevy Blazer until he hears that it's a tribute to the owner's nephew. Later, a haunted hotel owner wants a creepy bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Employee of the Year
programme.desc: Count's Kustoms has had its most successful year to date, and Danny wants to reward an employee who has done the most for the shop with a car. The problem is, he can't decide who that is, so he gets creative to pick a winner.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Willys for Warriors
programme.desc: Danny checks out a collection that includes a 1933 Ford Roadster and a '53 Henry J. Meanwhile Kevin, Ryan and Mike make an unauthorised purchase and the pressure is on Ryan to show it's worthwhile.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Dream, Kevin's Nightmare
programme.desc: Danny has wanted a Plymouth Roadrunner ever since a couple of car nuts pulled him over a few years ago and bought his Sebring on the spot. He's finally found one and he's doing it up exactly as he wants to. Meanwhile, Horny Mike takes on a project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: Danny has a customer who wants to restore a 1942 Ford truck that saw some action in WWII. But when Danny takes in the project, he quickly learns it'll need a lot more love than he thought. Roli and Ryan check out a '71 Duster.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full restoring a 1942 Ford truck that needed a lot of TLC and a special touch for the owner's wife. Danny and Ryan check out a badass 1929 Ford Roadster, while Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Ready, Set, Van Gogh!
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged to paint a Harley Trike in the spirit of Van Gogh's 'Starry Night.' Kevin finds a car that could be one the most valuable ones Danny has ever seen, if it's an original.

programme.title: Counting Cars: One Sweet 'Stang
programme.desc: Danny scores a 1967 Mustang that he hopes he can turn into another Count's Kustoms masterpiece. He visits a local muscle car collection for inspiration, and later brings in an expert from the Shelby headquarters for a seal of approval.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Swap Meet Mayhem
programme.desc: When Danny challenges the guys to come up with innovative money-making ideas for the shop, Shannon proposes building a bike from parts picked up at a swap meet, and Mike ups the ante by challenging Shannon to do it all in one day.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pick Ups and Ponies
programme.desc: Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. Later, Danny's bandmate Stoney gets in a fender bender and its Danny to the rescue.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Snider's Ride
programme.desc: Dee Snider of Twisted Sister stops by Count's Kustoms to have Danny turn his brand new Tesla into a rock 'n' roller's ride. But when strange things start happening, the guys aren't sure if it's blown a fuse or if it's possessed.

programme.title: Counting Cars: El Camino Royale
programme.desc: Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty. But if he's going to flip this ride for a big profit, the Count's Kustoms crew will have to put aside their differences.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boogie Down Buggy
programme.desc: Danny takes in a dune buggy to trick out in outrageous Count's Kustoms style, and then gets into some seriously higher horse powered fare at the Shelby Heritage Foundation.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '70s Scoot
programme.desc: Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so '70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done. Later, he hits the streets to check out a pair of classic Mini Coopers and a rare Split Bumper Camaro.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Red, Hot and Dangerous
programme.desc: Danny has big plans for a little street rocket known as a Manta and the crew commissions an 80s era Corvette that the owner wants to bring into the new millennium. Shannon meets a lady motorcycle racer who wants her Harley XR1200 customized.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny Doubles Down
programme.desc: The massive auto extravaganza known as SEMA is rolling into Las Vegas, and this time Danny will be ready. He's getting not one, but two incredible Counts Kustoms creations ready for the big show.

programme.desc: When Dina considers moving back to Miami Gabby and Olivia recruit some of Gabby's alien clients to create news to keep Dina busy.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Sing It On

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Skate-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv's skateboard pro boyfriend with the famous ponytail, Miller White, is coming to Wisconsin for a competition that Liv is set to judge. Her family is thrilled to meet him, and all goes well until Miller text dumps Liv hours later.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Steal-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Maddie tries to set Liv up with a new friend, Liv gets offended and explains she can find her own friends. Unfortunately, this drives Liv towards bad girl Kylie Kramer.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Ferris Wheels & Funky Breath
programme.desc: Austin is excited about a girl named Kaylee who's hired to play his love interest in his video. However when Austin comes face to face with Kaylee's bad breath, he wants to fire her but he can't because she's Jimmy Starr's daughter!

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Crybabies and Cologne
programme.desc: Trent asks Ally to write him a song to make him famous like Austin, but Austin hears the song and steals it for his own, so the gang needs to find a way to right the wrong.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned
programme.desc: Emma is upset when her friends stand her up for the new girl in school. Meanwhile, Luke has Ravi help him with his project about India for their school's multicultural night.

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Robostus

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sapotis

programme.title: Sofia the First: Enchanted Science Fair
programme.desc: Sofia and her friends get overly competitive while participating in an enchanted science fair project and learn that their friendship is more important than winning the fair.

programme.title: Sofia the First: When You Wish Upon a Well
programme.desc: Amber is jealous of the time Roland is spending with Sofia, so when she stumbles upon a wishing well, Amber wishes that Roland would become allergic to Sofia. But things go haywire when her wish accidentally turns Sofia into a cat!

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown

programme.title: Bluey: Mr. Monkeyjocks/ Typewriter/ Burger Shop

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo help Uncle Stripe and Bandit play squash, spend the day with Nana, and Bingo has to learn to play alone!

programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Snapped: Sante Kimes
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of an elderly New York socialite is the catalyst for the nationwide investigation into an unusual con duo, who treasure a luxurious way of life above all else, resulting in one of the biggest cases New York has ever seen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: He dreamed of being the next Steve Jobs, a young entrepreneur who wanted to change the world. But his world came crashing down one morning with four gunshots. This was a crime of passion: a fatal triangle involving a husband, a wife and a boss.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: Nona Dirksmeyer was a young beauty queen with a boyfriend she adored. They were planning a future together. Then, Nona was brutally killed. The crime shook her hometown and exposed someone with a secret past.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The McStay Family Mystery
programme.desc: When a beautiful family of four including two young children vanishes in California, police think they left voluntarily. It takes a decade for the awful truth to emerge: a killer, hiding in plain sight, slaughtered an entire family.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Best of Friends
programme.desc: When the body of insurance salesman Brian Davis is found alongside a bayou in Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana, police discover that he is a man with a life full of secrets. But could those closest to him be hiding the biggest secret of all?

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Pain Killer
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate is shot by an unidentified sniper and CPD races to catch the shooter before he can take out his next target.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: This City
programme.desc: With the threat of a gang war looming, Voight and Ray Price must organize a peace summit to end the bloodshed before more innocent people get hurt. Burgess evaluates her future with Blair.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been
programme.desc: Intelligence's investigation into the murder of Burgess's boyfriend threatens to reveal a dark side she was unaware of. The real motivation for his murder uncovers a much more unsettling truth.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sacrifice
programme.desc: A violent crew is hitting pharmaceutical delivery trucks and stealing drugs, but their motivation is more complicated than just money. The case tests Upton and Ruzek’s relationship.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confession
programme.desc: Antonio struggles with his guilty conscience as he tries to take down a major drug dealer. In order to protect his team, Voight takes a big shot at Kelton.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Texas Tragedy
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds work with the Jasper County Sheriff's Department to take on the 2012 disappearance of a 56-year-old mother. The investigation uncovers family drama, rumors of doomsday prepping and a daughter waiting for her mother to return.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Family Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly travels to Abbey Abbondandolo’s home state to work with the Idaho Falls PD to help investigate the 2007 homicide of a young mother. When her body was discovered almost 3 years later outside the city, it left a family searching for her killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Horror in the Home
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve Spingola partner once again to work with the Potter County Sheriff’s Department in Texas in investigating the brutal murder of a doting mother of four.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Predator
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny team up to tackle the 1988 murder of a woman whose headless body was found at a cemetery after a night at a local bar. The patrons of the bar could hold the key to identifying her killer and getting her family justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Kathleen Wise
programme.desc: A nurse's turbulent marriage flatlines when her husband dies from a lethal dose of liquid morphine.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day 2U
programme.desc: Two years after she was forced to relive the day of her murder over and over again, a young woman finds herself caught in another deadly time loop, only this time her friends are caught in it too, forcing her to unmask the killer to break the cycle.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dark Knight Court
programme.desc: Bart is falsely accused of pulling a prank on Easter involving the school marching band and stuffing rotten eggs in the brass section's horns, and Lisa must step in as his attorney to defend her brother.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What Animated Women Want
programme.desc: Once again, Homer must save his marriage when Marge gets fed up with his behavior. Meanwhile, after watching 'A Streetcar Named Desire,' Milhouse takes on a Marlon Brando-inspired bad-boy persona to attract Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pulpit Friction

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Grampa injures himself while babysitting Bart, and quickly discovers he prefers being cared for by his grandson than the staff at the nursing home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side, and his initial resistance quickly subsides when Marge hires Slava’s beautiful daughter, Zhenya, as his new piano instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson
programme.desc: When Homer and his friends win $200,000 in the Springfield lottery, Carl takes off to Iceland with all the winnings.

programme.title: Family Guy: Adam West High
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: Family Guy: Yacht Rocky
programme.desc: When the brewery announces it will be firing one employee, Peter is nervous he will be the one let go. In order to calm his nerves, the family departs on a Yacht Rock cruise that doesn’t go as expected.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Jeremiah Code
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Sunken Empire
programme.desc: The secrets of the world's oldest sunken city are lost to history, but hi-tech underwater archaeology answers questions that books cannot. Experts explore sunken ruins and reveal new discoveries about one of the first great empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: Egypt's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: The forgotten ruins of Amarna and a colossal stone temple on the remote island of Philae are sites of an elusive Egyptian past. Now, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets behind these buried mysteries of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Conspiracy of the Scrolls
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the most significant historical discoveries that the Vatican kept hidden for decades; now, experts investigate a possible conspiracy that could link this archaeological mystery to the location of a priceless treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Conspiracy of the Scrolls
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the most significant historical discoveries that the Vatican kept hidden for decades; now, experts investigate a possible conspiracy that could link this archaeological mystery to the location of a priceless treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Conspiracy of the Scrolls
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the most significant historical discoveries that the Vatican kept hidden for decades; now, experts investigate a possible conspiracy that could link this archaeological mystery to the location of a priceless treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Island of Secrets
programme.desc: A colossal stone temple on a remote Egyptian island mysteriously bears the names of the most famous leaders of the ancient world. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate why pharaohs and emperors all built monuments at this enigmatic site.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Terror Island
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Do You Love Me?
programme.desc: Jeanne Smith and her two daughters, Marie and Anna, make for a tight-knit, family trio. But when Jeanne and Anna go looking for love in all the wrong places, it ends in heartbreak, lies, and murder.

programme.title: Disappeared: Born This Way
programme.desc: When Sage Smith, a transgender teen in Charlottesville, Virginia goes missing, police identify a suspect. But the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle to see if there are answers.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Somebody Knows Something
programme.desc: Families of a college student and a mother of five are left stunned as their loved ones disappear and complicated conspiracies arise.

programme.title: Body Cam: Taken
programme.desc: In Colorado, an unpredictable armed ex-convict takes his family hostage and threatens to kill them and himself. In Florida, a gas station robbery leads to a life-threatening attack on a police officer and a night-time manhunt in the woods.

programme.title: Body Cam: Life in Ruins
programme.desc: In Ohio, SWAT tears down a house to arrest two brothers wanted for murder. In Washington, a high-speed pursuit ends when a crash entangles an officer's car in live electrical cables. In Texas, a DWI driver hits a goods train carrying explosive chemicals.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Somebody Knows Something
programme.desc: Families of a college student and a mother of five are left stunned as their loved ones disappear and complicated conspiracies arise.

programme.title: Body Cam: Taken
programme.desc: In Colorado, an unpredictable armed ex-convict takes his family hostage and threatens to kill them and himself. In Florida, a gas station robbery leads to a life-threatening attack on a police officer and a night-time manhunt in the woods.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: A mother of three grown children is stabbed in her own home in the middle of the day. Digging back through her life for motive, detectives are led to some unlikely suspects. It takes years, and one bold wiretap, to uncover what really happened to her.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Mennonite Mob
programme.desc: When a Mennonite family man is stopped for drunk-driving, no one could predict that it would expose a shocking underbelly of organized crime. Abraham Wiebe risks it all as a central figure in one of the largest criminal cases in Oklahoma history.

programme.title: My Strange Criminal Addiction: Quick Fix: The Video Voyeur
Crimes Gone Viral: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: An afternoon motorcycle ride turns into a violent road rage incident when a couple is attacked by an angry driver. And then, when a young woman working alone is robbed at knifepoint, she bravely fights back, fending off her assailant.

programme.title: Disappeared: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: When 70-year-old retired firefighter Michael Chambers goes missing, a bloody crime scene in his garage quickly indicates foul play. But authorities begin to believe that the crime scene may have been staged and that Michael may have left on his own.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Delve into real-life crime and justice cases, examining them from all angles.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Devastated by personal loss, Heather Kelso finds a fresh start in a familiar place and falls fast for charismatic Gerry DeJesus. But jealousy and other friendships will ultimately drive a deadly wedge straight into the heart of their relationship.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it's up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Looks Are Deceiving
programme.desc: Jennifer and Paul wanted an older home with character and curb appeal.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Looks Are Deceiving
programme.desc: When Andrew and Melissa had a little girl, they needed to buy a house with more space in a family friendly neighbourhood. They did not expect more problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Getting Hosed
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Through the Roof
programme.desc: Steven and Jennifer have been burned by a bad home inspection before, and decided to upgrade to a new house, confident that it would have fewer problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Attic Dealbreaker
programme.desc: Ross and Lisa foolishly allowed a family friend to do their home inspection for the price of a case of beer. While he told them a few things needed attention, he missed more than he saw.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Design Intervention
programme.desc: After overcoming a battle with drug addiction and homelessness, Chef Natalie opened the eclectic restaurant 'eat.' in Las Vegas with the help of a $225,000 loan she received as part of a city revitalization project.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Saving a Local Legend
programme.desc: Todd Graves heads to Irma's Original in Houston, a well-known restaurant and staple for Mexican food. After the shocking and unexpected death of her husband in 1989, Irma got herself out of the fog of grief by opening a small sandwich shop.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Secret of Success/ The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: G.O.A.T.s: All Access
programme.desc: The GOATS become champions, and confront the double-edged sword of fame. The rise up is one thing, maintaining a level of excellence is another. The paradoxes within America's great events, where access is a struggle.

programme.desc: A small plane crash in Seattle causes multiple casualties and brings back horrible memories for the doctors, especially Meredith and Arizona. Meanwhile, friction between Owen and Amelia makes for an uncomfortable working situation for Stephanie.

programme.title: The Closer: Grave Doubts
programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.title: The Closer: Saving Face
programme.desc: At a retired cop's funeral, Provenza and Flynn discover something unexpected in the coffin.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: After finding another victim, Sharon angrily turns her attention back to former LAPD Det. Mark Hickman, who has a secret that may be a motive for murder. Meanwhile, the possible gang war ratchets up a notch with three more murders.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: As more information pours in about victims from the past, and how they tie to the murders of the present, Lt. Cooper and Amy Sykes get caught in an unexpected gun fight. Sharon finds leverage against Rev. Price, his attorney, and Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: The conclusion of Hindsight ties all the threads of seven murders together as the video wire on Rev. Price elicits admissions from his younger brother, narrowing the field of suspects to three. Mark Hickman finally confronts the truth about his past.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Present Tense
programme.desc: The Major Crimes squad investigates the mysterious disappearance of a teenage girl, who vanished while volunteering at a homeless shelter. Meanwhile Buzz cracks open the decades old cold case file on the murder of his father and uncle.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Money, Sons, and Guns
programme.desc: When an alarm goes off in an affluent Jupiter, Florida neighborhood, investigators must determine whether they're dealing with a suicide or something more sinister.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Love, Sex and Greed
programme.desc: Patrons are stunned when a man is gunned down at an Akron gas station, but investigators will be even more shocked when they uncover the four-way love affair behind the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Bad Cop
programme.desc: A former police officer stalked, assaulted, and attempted to seduce young women and was arrested while looking for sex with minor girls on internet chatrooms. He serves time but flees while out on parole.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Factory of Death
programme.desc: After blackmailing his Southern California employers about their illegal employment practices, an undocumented factory worker vanishes.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life
programme.desc: A young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Preaching Lies
programme.desc: The leader of the religious sect The River Road Fellowship, Victor Barnard is alleged to have collected ten young girls from his congregation into a group he names 'The Maidens.' When an escapee reports his abuse to the police, he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Lost Tomb From the Lookout
programme.desc: Josh Gates lands in the ancient Mayan city of El Mirador to look for the lost tomb of the Snake Kings, a mysterious ruling dynasty.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Final Resting Place of Kings
programme.desc: Josh continues his exploration of the Mayan city of El Mirador. He digs into the possible burial of the mysterious Snake Kings and uncovers secrets behind an ancient city's fall.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Normandy Revealed
programme.desc: Josh investigates the battles on land, air and sea in the historic city of Normandy. He reveals a horrific Nazi threat and unearths an enormous German bunker complex that's been hidden for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Normandy Revealed
programme.desc: Josh investigates the battles on land, air and sea in the historic city of Normandy. He reveals a horrific Nazi threat and unearths an enormous German bunker complex that's been hidden for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: John Gates joins treasure hunters in the search for the Golden Owl, worth half a million dollars. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues as to where the Owl statuette is hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Cathedral Relics
programme.desc: Drew visits a 12th-Century cathedral and an aviation museum.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Ripley Castle Decorative Salvage Fair
programme.desc: Drew visits the Ripley Castle Decorative Salvage Fair and an art collection in a seaside town.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: 19th-Century Weaving
programme.desc: Drew visits a 19th-Century weaving mill that makes quality clothing. He also visits a historic manor house mentioned in the Doomsday book and checks out a shop in an old Methodist church.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Quaint and Quirky
programme.desc: Drew meets some dealers who collect Cold War relics.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Handmade Knives
programme.desc: Drew meets a cutler who makes bespoke hunting knives by hand, then he visits a heritage railway and museum.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Travel's Golden Age
programme.desc: An Eames lounge chair, an oil lamp, and a steam trunk are restored.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Pre-WWII Carousel Horse
programme.desc: A carousel, a sofa, and a weathervane, all pre-WWII, are restored.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska Range
programme.desc: Ana and Jacob White, leading furniture DIY-ers with thousands of social media followers, build their dream cabin in the remote Alaskan interior on Paxson Lake.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.
